name: State Grid Yingda Co.,Ltd.
summary: State Grid Yingda Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells transformers in China. It offers wind farm amorphous alloy transformers, silicon steel distribution transformers, prefabricated substations, amorphous alloy combination transformers, and amorphous alloy distribution transformers. The company was formerly known as Shanghai Zhixin Electric Co., Ltd. and changed its name to State Grid Yingda Co., Ltd. in April 2020. State Grid Yingda Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Shanghai, China.
